log.text: Slides for CocoaBench: examples and creation

log.notes:
GLM-5 Mid-train: concatenating repo-level code files, commit diffs, GitHub issues, pull requests, and relevant source files into unified training sequences (10 million issueŌĆōPR pairs, 160B unique tokens)

GLM-5 SFT: A large number of execution environments, with particular emphasis on real-world scenarios and long-horizon tasks. We further improve the SFT data using **expert reinforcement learning and rejection sampling**. Erroneous segments within trajectories are retained but **masked out** in the loss function, allowing the model to learn error correction behaviors without reinforcing incorrect actions.

**Martingales**: a mathematical model of a "fair game." A sequence of random variables $X_1, X_2, \dots, X_n$ is a martingale if the expected value of the next observation, given all the past observations, is exactly equal to the most recent observation:$E[X_{n+1} | X_1, X_2, \dots, X_n] = X_n$’╝īµā│Ķ▒ĪÕżÜĶĮ«µŖøńĪ¼ÕĖüĶĄīķÆ▒Õ░▒µś»õ║å

**Optional Stopping Theorem (OST)**: If $M_n$ is a martingale and $\tau$ is a valid stopping time (a rule for stopping that only depends on the present and past, not the future), then under certain bounded conditions:$$E[M_\tau] = E[M_0]$$

expectation of geometric distribution:
- first review Geometric series $$\frac{a_0 * (1-r)^n}{1-r}. the expectation (product of geometric and arithmetic sequence) can be derived by **differentiating** the infinite series of Geometric sequence.
- Another trick is to use recursion. E(x) = q + (1-q) (E(x) + 1) (q is stopping prob)

2026-03-14.nightMessage:
- **Work**
  - Long work session on vibe coding Tracker.
  - I got Tracker basically set up today.
  - I did not feel like I was thinking very deeply.

- **Social**
  - Stayed home all day.
  - Kun invited me to go hiking at the last minute, which annoyed me, so I did not go.
  - I could probably have handled it with a calmer mindset.

- **Mood / anxiety**
  - I found out the girl I have a crush on has a boyfriend.
  - Later at night I saw Elon Musk talking about refactoring the coding team again, which made me worry that I might not get my offer.

- **Body**
  - My eyes felt a bit tired.
  - I still have an ulcer in my throat.
  - Not wearing socks all day felt uncomfortable.
  - Sitting cross-legged too much also felt bad.
  - Muscle recovery was okay.
  - Diet was just average.

- **Things I did well**
  - I did not play games.
  - I mostly avoided checking Twitter / xAI news during the day to keep offer anxiety from getting worse.
  - I will likely sleep early.

- **Tomorrow**
  - What I want to carry into tomorrow is simply to keep using Tracker.
  - I want to plan a bit better, because today I did not really have much of a plan.
  - Top priorities:
    - review ICML ŌĆö hard deadline
    - think about the CocoaBench story ŌĆö most important task

2026-03-15.morningMessage: Sleep duration and bedtime improved, but I stayed awake for quite a while in the middle of the night. Mental clarity feels normal. Mood feels pretty neutral this morning. I felt a bit cold while sleeping, and I still have an ulcer in my throat.
2026-03-15.nightMessage:
No deep-work vibe overall, but still got several useful things done: reviewed two papers, organized CocoaBench a bit, met with Zhoujun and Junli, and fixed some Tracker bugs.

Socially, saw many people today: lunch with Tianyang and Yuecong, gym + dinner with Qiyue, Kun, and Zhishang, and a discussion with Zhoujun and Junli. By the evening, social state did not feel fully under control.

Mood was good overall: no urgent pressure source, a more relaxed day, and Tracker helped the day feel more manageable and under control. Gym also felt especially good.

Body was mixed: sleep quality was not high, mind did not feel very clear after waking up, and chest tightness / shortness of breath felt fairly serious around noon. But the afternoon gym session felt very energetic. Also spent time at night researching arch and hip exercises.

2026-03-16.morningMessage: Sleep quality was mixed because I woke up multiple times. Clarity feels okay overall. Mood is okay; not seeing news this morning helped, but there is still some low-level xAI anxiety in the background. Body feels mixed: glutes are sore from yesterday's training, and the throat ulcer is still there.
2026-03-16.nightMessage:
Sleep quality was not enough. Morning procrastination and a low-focus work environment made my energy clearly insufficient.

In the evening, pressure from Xiaodong to decide on the offer amplified my job-search anxiety, and my management system basically collapsed.

Lesson: when I get into this state, I should leave, clean up, and sleep instead of pretending I can still work efficiently.

Good parts: I still went for a run in the morning and felt very alive; I engaged deeply in the UDA discussion; I did pretty well socially at dinner.

Tomorrow: sleep well tonight and start the day with a clear head.

Key tasks tomorrow: ByteDance offer conversation (10:30-11:30), gym reset, 1.5h UDA, 1.5h cocoabench session, harborRL session, cocoabench meeting at night.

Priorities: UDA (keep collaborator trust), cocoabench.

Reminder: bring headphones to school.

log.notes: felt anxious and drifted
Chatted with Yu and Hanlin

2026-03-17.morningMessage: Slept 02:00-10:00. Overall sleep was okay; woke up once before getting up. Still feels tired and slow to respond. Mood is neutral. Eyes feel uncomfortable this morning.

log.notes: Meet with Zhoujun

2026-03-18.nightMessage:
Had a lot of meetings today, which made focus pretty low, but some projects still moved forward.

Socially things were mostly okay. During the intern meeting, I could have been more patient.

Mood was fairly neutral overall, but I felt unfocused in the meeting with MBZ. Later, after the call with Boshi, I got a bit shaken by ByteDance-related thoughts, and then seeing a long-distance-separation animation made me emo at night.

Physically I was mostly okay, just a bit sleepy.

Worst part of the day: falling into that emo state at night.
Best part of the day: milk tea.

Insight: deep work helps relieve anxiety.

For tomorrow: I want to feel stronger, not be affected so much by other people's negative energy, and be the one who brings positive energy.

Mood is okay but still a bit affected by not seeing any message from xAI this morning.

Mentally I feel better than the last two days.

Physically everything feels okay.
